title: NEW COMMUNITY
doc_html:
CHAPTER 21.  NEW COMMUNITY

DEVELOPMENT CORPORATIONS

§7601.  Short title

This chapter may be referred to as the "New Community Development Act."

Acts 1972, No. 553, §1.
